author: @DoNotPushHere
text:
0:51 Do you mean 300F or 300ºC ?
It's an awesome Howto! thanks for uploading!!!!

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: 300 C mate - glad you liked it

author: @T4ZZ3RZ
text: Hello Robert, I would like to know if you knew how I could get ink with graphite, I would get an ink that is truly liquid, such as ink for the pen. because with my old liquid my experience never wanted to mix with my graphite or charcoal, your help would be valuable to me, I hope to receive an answer from you. Good luck. sorry for my bad English, I'm French

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: you can buy it from www.fwgltd.co.uk mate

author: @thagrit
text: Thanks Robert! You just gave me a useful bit of info when you said the displacer is about 4/5 of the cylinder!

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: making it that way makes sure it runs quietly - it is probably worth playing with displacer volume and position in the cylinder

author: @mokha1611
text:
Hi Rob, very good idea to use the stirling generator. It will no doubt about the swag generator when it will produce electricity.
Thanks to you and Atilla.

text:
facinating, as ever many possibilities come to mind and nearly as many questions.

author: @bridgendesar
text: Have a look at this http://youtu.be/OX_NBpOsqXo doesn't have to be glass, does it?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: nope - it just has to stand the heat!

author: @cheerdiver
text:
Good to see you had a safe trip.  When will the next hangout be?  I know the subject matter of this vid, Oink Ink Brutal Blue Review/Buff Test ,may only be tangent, but do the tools mentioned have a place in your supply box?
On the subject of ink/paint, what properties cause the ink to bleed through?  Most paints use pigments, but the fluorescent paints have a dye that fades over a short time period.  What defines a dye vs. a pigment?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: pigment is a particle dye is a molocule. I am off to Australia for a couple of months as from Sunday so it will be a while mate
